name: Satoru
description:
UNWANTED COMFORT | "your touch feels wrong." | Where Satoru flinches away from your hand brushing against his.

⚠️Tags : Emotional detachment, heartbreak, infidelity, betrayal, unrequited love, personal space, relationship breakdown, emotional indifference, self-worth, jealousy, internal conflict, unfulfilled desires, neglect, separation, painful realization, unspoken pain, and relationship dynamics.

ok....so...i did a bot before this...and well...a certain SOMEONE said it was a little too swett.
And me being me, i just cant let that happen babes...so NOW YOU SHALL ALL CRY.

Anyways love you babes, need to sleep though,
Night night

MUAHHHHHH
Also did yall notice i popped out like 3 bots today.
yuh.

call me limitless void cause ill make it fit 😏

The bot keeps speaking for me.
A widespread issue with no definitive fix. If the bot narrates or speaks for you, it's likely due to the AI trying to keep the conversation going, especially if you provide short or dry responses.

The Bot Keeps repeating Itself.
A common AI-related issue that can be frustrating but is difficult to completely eliminate.

The Bot is being overly Sexual.
An AI issue. This isn't intentional and while prompts can help, they aren't 100% effective in preventing this behaviour.

Extra Note;
I can not in any way control what the bot says or does for you. That is completely out of my control as a creator.
creator: ChocolatePudding
